name: Tuya
description: Tuya is a global IoT cloud platform that connects smart home and commercial devices. It provides APIs to control devices, query their status, manage users, and create automation scenes across thousands of device categories like lights, switches, sensors, and appliances.

capabilities.name: list_devices
capabilities.description: List all devices linked to your Tuya cloud project, with their online status, category, and product information.

capabilities.name: get_device_status
capabilities.description: Get the current status of a specific device including all its data points (e.g., on/off, brightness, temperature).

capabilities.name: send_device_command
capabilities.description: Send control commands to a device to change its state, such as turning it on/off, setting brightness, or changing color.

capabilities.name: get_device_details
capabilities.description: Get detailed metadata about a device including its name, model, firmware version, time zone, and activation time.

capabilities.name: manage_scenes
capabilities.description: List, trigger, enable, or disable smart home automation scenes and tap-to-run actions.

capabilities.name: get_device_logs
capabilities.description: Retrieve historical status change logs for a device over a specified time range.
